nasb.text: Then she called to her husband and said, “Please send me one of the servants and one of the donkeys, that I may run to the man of God and return.”

esv.text: Then she called to her husband and said, “Send me one of the servants and one of the donkeys, that I may quickly go to the man of God and come back again.”

cnv.text: 她呼喚她的丈夫，說：“請你派一個僕人和一頭驢子給我。我要趕到神人那裡，立刻就回來。”

ccb.text: 她叫来丈夫，对他说：“请你预备一个仆人和一头驴，我好赶快去见上帝的仆人，然后返回来。”
